query:
SELECT 
  i.id, 
  i.numero, 
  i.dominioId, 
  i.publicada, 
  i.slug, 
  i.titulo,
  d.nombre AS dominio_nombre,
  d.slug AS dominio_slug
FROM investigaciones i
LEFT JOIN dominios d ON i.dominioId = d.id
WHERE i.titulo LIKE '%Estr%s Hídrico%' OR i.slug LIKE '%estres-hidrico%' OR d.slug = 'agua'
ORDER BY i.numero ASC;
